subject: mtd: maps: fix error return code of physmap_flash_remove()

features.post_operation: assign negative errno to err (e.g., err = -EINVAL)
features.path_conditions: When platform_get_drvdata() returns NULL and the function jumps to cleanup label without setting err, the caller receives success (0) despite an error condition.
features.fit_test_reasoning: Error-return code bug. Function detects an error (NULL pointer), takes the error cleanup path via goto, but err remains 0 because the error code was never assigned. Fits the broader pattern: a check identifies an error, but the return code does not reflect it.
